primary_variant_class_for_cmt1a.expected_copy_number_concept: normal diploid copy number is usually 2; CMT1A classically involves PMP22-region duplication, often interpreted as 3 copies in affected heterozygous state

local_analysis_purpose: Use this target as an interval filter for VCF/SV/CNV records.
Prioritize records where CHROM=17 and record interval overlaps 15229773-15272292 on GRCh38.
Inspect INFO fields such as SVTYPE, END, SVLEN, CN, CNV, CIPOS, CIEND and genotype fields such as GT/CN when present.
notes: Coordinates are assembly-dependent. Do not mix GRCh37 and GRCh38 files without liftover or explicit assembly metadata.
The user-provided Ensembl page and DECIPHER both identify PMP22 around chr17:15.23-15.27 Mb on GRCh38.
For GenoMatic1000, this is a target manifest, not a patient diagnosis file.
